dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items

Class Item<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>

  • java.lang.Object
    • dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items.Item<T,S>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IItem<T,S>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AsyncItem, StaticItem

    public class Item<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>
extends Object
implements IItem<T,S>

    • Method Detail

      • stringMaterial

        public Item<T,S> stringMaterial(String stringMaterial)
        Use a string as a material. Placeholders from the replacer or PlaceholderAPI will be applied. The string material will override the item material. Example: "%player_uuid%" can be used to get the player's skull as the item.

        Parameters:
        stringMaterial - The string material
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • eventHandler

        public Item<T,S> eventHandler(ItemEventHandler<T,S> eventHandler)
        Set the event handler for the item.

        Parameters:
        eventHandler - The event handler to use
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.17.0

      • show

        public Item<T,S> show(Predicate<org.bukkit.entity.Player> show)
        Set a condition for the item to be shown.

        Parameters:
        show - The condition for the item to be shown
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • show

        public Item<T,S> show(BiPredicate<org.bukkit.entity.Player,S> show)
        Set a condition for the item to be shown.

        Parameters:
        show - The condition for the item to be shown
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.16.2

      • asList

        public Item<T,S> asList(AsList<?,T,S> asList)
        Set the item as a list.

        Parameters:
        asList - The list to use
        Returns:
        The item

      • clickAction

        public Item<T,S> clickAction(BiConsumer<org.bukkit.entity.Player,Item.WrappedInventoryClickEvent<T,S>> clickAction)
        Set the click action for the item. If a AsList is in use, then the callback in the asList will be used instead.

        Parameters:
        clickAction - The action to run when the item is clicked
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • onClick

        public Item<T,S> onClick(BiConsumer<org.bukkit.entity.Player,Item.WrappedInventoryClickEvent<T,S>> clickAction)
        Alias for clickAction(BiConsumer)

        Parameters:
        clickAction - The action to run when the item is clicked
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • replacer

        public Item<T,S> replacer(Replacer<S> replacer)
        Add a replacer to the item.

        Parameters:
        replacer - The replacer to add
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • fallbackItem

        public Item<T,S> fallbackItem(ItemBuilder fallbackItem)
        Set the fallback item for the item. The fallback item will be used if the item is not shown. A fallback item DOES NOT support asList or when the item is static.

        Parameters:
        fallbackItem - The fallback item
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.10.0

      • parseSlot

        public List<Integer> parseSlot()
        Parse the slot string to a list of slots.

        Returns:
        The list of slots
        Since:
        1.15.0

      • parseSlotFirst

        public int parseSlotFirst()
        Parse the slot string to a single slot.

        Returns:
        The slot
        Since:
        1.15.0

        public void add()
        Add the item to the gui.
        Since:
        1.5

      • call

        public void call(org.bukkit.entity.Player player,
                 T gui,
                 org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event,
                 S localStorage)
        Used to call the click action.

        Parameters:
        player - The player who clicked the item
        gui - The gui
        event - The event
        localStorage - The local storage
        Since:
        1.5

      • build

        public dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.GuiItem build(S storage,
                                              org.bukkit.entity.Player player,
                                              dev.triumphteam.gui.components.GuiAction<org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent> call,
                                              Replacer<S> replacer,
                                              T gui,
                                              boolean fallback)
        Build the item as a GuiItem.

        Parameters:
        storage - The storage to use
        player - The player to use
        call - the callback to run when the item is clicked
        replacer - The replacer to use
        gui - The gui to use
        fallback - If the fallback item should be used
        Returns:
        The item as a GuiItem
        Since:
        1.5.1
